title: Forecasting Inputs Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger forecasting inputs foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Forecasting Inputs Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Forecasting Inputs Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good forecasting inputs foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Forecasting Inputs Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
